name: Broker
description: This data element reports the intermediary that arranged the transaction on behalf of the Reporting Entity (and potentially also on behalf of Counterparty 2) without becoming a counterparty to the transaction.
format: LEI (Legal Entity Identifier) with a registration status of ‘Issued’, ‘Lapsed’, ‘Pending transfer’ or ‘Pending archival’. Must not be an LEI of a branch of the entity. For reports with Action type REVI, any LEI registration status is allowed.
optionalityRules: Required, if applicable, for Action types: NEWT, MODI, CORR, REVI
Not reported for Action types: TERM, EROR, PRTO
valueRules: Broker's LEI must not equal the LEI for Counterparty 1 or Counterparty 2.
If a broker enters into a transaction in a principal or 'matched principal' capacity, it is reported as Counterparty 2, not Broker.
Reporting entity should not report themselves as Broker.
